title: TOEY PLAY 36PCS Animal Figures, Realistic Bugs Insects, Wild Jungle Zoo, Dinosaur, Assorted Animal Toy for Kids, Cake Topper, Gifts for Boys Girls 3 4 5 6 Years Old
features: Safari Animals - Wild jungle animal toys playset includes Hippo, Giraffe, Lion, Rhino, Black Bear, Polar Bear, Zebra, Elephant, Tiger etc in total 12 animals. Bringing kids falling wonderful wildlife world.
Dinosaur Figures- 12 dino figures includes Tyrannosaurus Rex, Triceratops, Velociraptor, Stegosaurus etc. Dive kids into the dino world and start a dinosaur battle.
Fake Bugs Toys - Contains 12 different realistic insect models, which includes ladybird, Bee, Locust, Butterflie, Spider, Unicorn, Scorpion, Centipede etc.
Realistic and Durable - Each toy figure is made of high quality materials, modelled after real creatures for extra durability and realism.

Rich Types - Covering a variety of ecological and nature types, let children know more about wild jungle animals, dinosaurs and insect figures, which satisfy children's extensive interest in science and nature world.
Kids Favors - About 2-9.5cm. Suitable for small hands and the ages 3 4 5 6 7 years old as collection, decoration or rewards, cake topper toy. Great Preschool Educational Toy!
